posts.author: ben.pearcy (Ben Pearcy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The workflow automator is a good idea, however the implementation is currently a bit lacking. One thing that would help greatly would be placeholder support across all fields. For example, if I want to create a project with several supporting boards, I should be able to use placeholders to do so. Workspace/Active Projects/{Project Name}

What are you trying to achieve

The workflow automator is a good idea, however the implementation is currently a bit lacking. One thing that would help greatly would be placeholder support across all fields. For example, if I want to create a project with several supporting boards, I should be able to use placeholders to do so. Workspace/Active Projects/{Project Name}
